taxonomy.description: Cross-tenant data leakage or unauthorized access to other tenant resources.
Failure to block requests exceeding quotas or violating deployment contract rules.
Missing critical events in the lifecycle (CREATED, STARTED, COMPLETED) for a given requestId.
Failure to correctly identify a user or leakage of authentication mechanics.
Unauthorized scope/role escalation or contract-governed support model bypass.
Files written to incorrect or shared paths instead of tenant-scoped storage.
Jobs stuck in non-terminal states without automated cleanup or quarantine.
Audit events generated but not persisted to DB or logs correctly (e.g. governance_snapshot missing).
Audit queries or forensic lookups are slow due to missing or fragmented indexes.
